reviews.review_description: It won't open when i start it

I got this because I like shooting games where you can sit if you prefer, but there’s no setting to adjust for it like there is in Zombieland Headshot Fever, for instance.  This results in not being able to properly see the entire playing field. 

Otherwise, it’s an okay game.

I got 28 years of gaming expierience and tried 100 vr games, that's easily my top 3. It works exactly like it's supposed to and i like the graphics and story. Good job, it doesn't feel like vr game it feels like a real game :p
Easy to follow and simple, really enjoyed it
What a great game packed in a very funny Wild West Story. Perfect

The game is funny, even if it is not super realistic... this may be what we like, by the way. On the other hand, the - very - lengthy introductions (even if you skip the video intros), game interruptions, and dialogues at 2 cents spoil the game. We are quickly fed up!
Moreover, the game is very short, we finish it in only a few hours.
Well.. some pros and some cons. Not fantastic!
Fun game to play
I am so sick of buying games that say they can be played sitting, only to find myself under a desk or counter while seated.
This game is the worst!!!!  I want a refund!

The games okay, you can’t really “die” in the game so there really isn’t much of a challenge. And the game is too short. The story mode is amusing, but not enough for the price. I wish they had infinite mode and a health bar.

My absolute favorite VR game for quick, mindless fun. Not sure why people are leaving negative reviews. This game owns over the top weapons, non-stop action, and quick fun. You either love these types of games or you don't - I love them and this is the best one out there for that.

reviews.review_title: As a Dad having fun and playing games
reviews.review_description: Yeah I'm not your typical "gamer" but we this kind of tech and gaming from the quest it's a lot of bang for your buck and it's fun the storyline is what it is an old grandfather telling some stories.. it's great! Great play great game... But again I'm not a Gamer "gamer" just someone enjoying the Oculus quest.
I am new to VR and never have been a gamer, but I love this game! It is funny, has several weapons to use and has good graphics. I would purchase again and recommend it to friends.

I love the game it’s fun in the story mode but the accuracy of the guns is not that great. It’s still fun and keeps you busy for a good time!! I mean for 10$ I would buy again!!! Just wish the accuracy was more on!
It's incredible funny and addictive. If you are into wild wild west you gonna love this.
Purchased the game,haven’t even played it as the start button on the menu won’t register,trying to report the problem is a nightmare,looking to get a refund,not happy with game

reviews.review_title: I would not have expected this
reviews.review_description:
I thought about buying it for a long time because I didn't like the comic style that much at first, but that quickly wears off.  Once you fire the first shot, the fun begins.  It feels like an old arcade shooting gallery in a arcade, brutal madness.  I feel like a kid again. I've played my glasses out now and I can't wait to keep playing.

 The controls are very well implemented, the precision of the weapons could be better for me personally, but it's fun and doesn't bother you directly, but if you're looking for highscore you'll feel it.

 All in all the game is worth the money, very long and a lot of fun for young and old. You can even switch off the blood in the options so it is also suitable for children.
Very basic game. Got bored quite quickly

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for your review.
I think that there can be absolutely polar reviews for the very first game of the studio, as it really is) 
This game is like our discovery of VR for ourselves, which means that on average it is optimal for all ages and for those who are just getting acquainted with VR.

reviews.review_description:
Rinse and repeat the game play is repetitive to the extreme.I like a good rail shooter but is not one. 
Wish I had spent my money else were 

Buyer beware even for the price I would invest a little more for a better game

This is a great game.  Funny story mode with voice over which adds charm to the game.  Great game for all ages.  Once you beat story mode you can play it still a bunch as you try to beat each level with the different weapons you unlocked.  We’ll worth every penny.
